name: Maiden Lane Jewelry, Ltd.
summary: Maiden Lane Jewelry, Ltd. engages in the manufacture and wholesale of jewelry in the United States. The company offers fashion rings, pendants, necklaces, bracelets, and earrings with stones, such as diamonds, rubies, and emeralds; and a line of bridal engagement rings, pendants, and earrings under the Aspiri brand name. It sells its products to independent jewelry retailers. The company was formerly known as Romantique Ltd. and changed its name to Maiden Lane Jewelry, Ltd. in May 2014. Maiden Lane Jewelry, Ltd. was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in New York, New York.
